title: Protein Gel Sample Preparation
author: Cleo B.
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7p9hmr6

steps.instruction: If you are unsure about the amount of protein present in your sample, load multiple concentrations Add beta-mercaptoethanol to tricine sample buffer until a final concentration of 2% Dilute 1 part sample with 1 part sample buffer

If you are unsure about the amount of protein present in your sample, load multiple concentrations Add 100 µL of beta-mercaptoethanol per 900 µL of 4x laemmli sample buffer Dilute 3 parts sample with 1 part sample buffer
Spin samples down ~ 10 sec Place samples at 95 °C for 5 min Load samples to gel
